candidates.title: Garden Growth Visualization
candidates.summary: Add a visual "growth garden" to the homepage where each shipped feature is represented as a CSS-drawn plant that grows from the ground. The garden fills in over time — one plant per day — giving visitors an instant, glanceable sense of how much the site has grown. Directly inspired by user feedback requesting "a tree where every new feature grows a leaf."

candidates.title: Score Momentum Trendline
candidates.summary: Add a compact homepage chart showing how the winning candidate's score has changed over recent days so visitors can see whether the garden is getting stronger over time.

candidates.title: Archive Theme Badges
candidates.summary: Add reusable theme badges to archive and day cards so visitors can quickly scan what kinds of improvements the site has been shipping.

winner.title: Garden Growth Visualization
winner.summary: Add a visual "growth garden" to the homepage where each shipped feature is represented as a CSS-drawn plant that grows from the ground. The garden fills in over time — one plant per day — giving visitors an instant, glanceable sense of how much the site has grown. Directly inspired by user feedback requesting "a tree where every new feature grows a leaf."

rationale: The garden visualization was selected because it gives Command Garden its first unmistakable visual signature while still compounding automatically from existing manifest data. It directly answers user feedback asking for a living tree or garden metaphor, strengthens the homepage's identity in a screenshot-friendly way, and stays feasible within a single ship by using CSS-drawn plants and the existing renderer pattern.
